markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review GrowthX's content strategy and define the Framer CMS workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Validated:** GrowthX's 6 SEO topic clusters (e.g., AI SOC, Threat Hunting) were approved. The "AI SOC" cluster is a top priority, aligning with Panther's major AI feature launch in March.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [**Framer Workflow Defined:** A strict approval process was set: Google Doc draft review → Staging link review → Publish. This ensures quality control and prevents errors from reaching the CEO.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - **Critical Publication Rule:** Before publishing, check the `#web-dev-updates` Slack channel for a "freeze" notice. If active, publishing is blocked to prevent conflicts with major site deployments.
  - [**Image Creation Delegated:** GrowthX will create blog images via a new workflow, freeing up Katie's time. Samples are due next week for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & SEO

  - [GrowthX's content strategy, based on competitor SEO analysis, was reviewed and approved.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [**6 Approved Topic Clusters:**](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [AI SOC](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [Detection Engineering & Threat Hunting](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [Cloud Security Threats & Detection Guides](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [Incident Response & SOC Operations](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [SIM Alternatives & Comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [Security Data Architecture & Log Management](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The clusters target keywords with high search volume and low difficulty, filling content gaps relative to competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [**Priority:** The "AI SOC" cluster is critical for supporting Panther's major AI feature launch in March.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)

### Framer CMS Workflow

  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
    1.  [**Draft:** GrowthX shares a Google Doc for review by Katie and Seema.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
    2.  [**Staging:** After edits, GrowthX stages the post in Framer and sends a preview link for final approval.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
    3.  **Publishing:**
          - **Check Slack:** Before publishing, check `#web-dev-updates` for a "freeze" notice.
          - [**If Active:** Publishing is blocked.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
          - [**If Clear:** Publish the post.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This multi-step review process ensures quality control and prevents errors from reaching the CEO, who is highly attentive to website content.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)

### Framer CMS Details

  - [**Post Collection:** Use the "Post" collection for all new blog items.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [**Fields:**](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [**First Feature/Second Feature:** Tag only one post as "First Feature" to avoid multiple banners on the blog page.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [**Subtitle:** Optional; appears below the title.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
      - [**Blog Filters:** Katie will update the filter list to better reflect content topics, adding:](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
          - [AI SOC](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
          - [Cloud Security, Detection Response, Data Engineering](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
          - [Threat Research](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
      - [**Author:** Use "Panther" for now. A future update will add author photos and titles.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
      - [**Reading Time:** Not used.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Blog Image Creation

  - [**New Workflow:** GrowthX will create blog images using a new, consistent design workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This frees up Katie's time and provides a scalable solution, as Katie is running out of unique stock photos.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [**Deliverable:** GrowthX will provide sample images next week for Katie's approval.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [Share the first two draft articles with Katie and Seema within the next hour.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [Provide sample blog images for approval next week.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [**Katie:**](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
      - Add GrowthX team members to the `#web-dev-updates` Slack channel.
      - [Update the blog filter list in Framer.](https://fathom.video/share/vf9mjU8rJnWsrbFsmpBpimdWhK9gYLy_?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
